task: Advanced high-value task: Robust Facility Location Candidate Triage-to-Test Plan. Scenario: a high-value system is approaching an engineering gate and the owner needs a defensible go/no-go packet for robust facility location candidate. Embedded packet: Records: R1 capacity_units=27 demand_units=50 fixed_cost_k=8; R2 capacity_units=36 demand_units=46 fixed_cost_k=11; R3 capacity_units=22 demand_units=61 fixed_cost_k=7. Remediation options: O1 changes capacity_units by -12% cost=69500; O2 changes demand_units by -18% cost=89500; O3 changes fixed_cost_k by -25% cost=50500; max_budget=114000. Rules and constraints: unmet demand penalty applies when capacity<demand; choose minimum expected cost; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: write a specialist-facing memo that distinguishes calculation results, assumptions, missing inputs, and expert-review questions. Deliver facility_location_3.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
